# Provines Consulting
> AI marketing infrastructure for business owners. I build your complete marketing stack — website, AI assistants, CRM, content engine, lead flow — and hand you the keys.

## About
Connor Provines runs Provines Consulting out of the Bay Area. 12+ years B2B SaaS marketing leadership (demand gen, marketing ops, RevOps, GTM strategy) across companies from 0→1 and 1→10. Self-taught technical builder who ships production AI systems, multi-agent workflows, voice agents, lead enrichment pipelines, and full web applications.

## What I Build
I build marketing infrastructure for business owners who need marketing capacity but don't have or want a full marketing team. The core offering is a complete marketing stack — website, CRM, AI assistants, content engine, SEO, lead automation — built as infrastructure you own. No retainers. No lock-in. Everything gets handed over with full ownership.

## Services
- Marketing Infrastructure Build: Complete marketing department built as infrastructure — website, CRM, AI assistants, content engine, SEO, ads integration
- AI Assistants & Intelligent Automation: Claude-powered AI agents that connect to CRM, manage workflows, handle lead intake, content, scheduling, and customer communication
- Website Platform & AI-Managed Content: Next.js websites that are fast, SEO-optimized, and updatable in plain English through AI assistants
- CRM & Lead Operations: Full lead lifecycle automation — capture, enrichment, scoring, routing, follow-up, reporting
- SEO & Content Engine: AI-driven content pipeline with automated publishing, keyword tracking, and SEO monitoring
- Custom Development: Internal dashboards, client portals, reporting tools, industry-specific applications

## Technology
- Web: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Vercel
- AI: Anthropic Claude, Claude API, multi-agent workflows
- Data: Supabase, MongoDB
- CRM: GoHighLevel, HubSpot, custom
- Voice: ElevenLabs, Twilio
- Automation: n8n, custom pipelines

## Target Audience
Service businesses, contractors, home builders, professional firms, and SMB owner-operators who need marketing infrastructure but don't have a marketing team. Also small SaaS companies looking for AI integration.

## Key Differentiators
- Strategy + implementation in one person (12+ years marketing leadership + full-stack development)
- Everything built for independence — you own code, data, infrastructure
- AI assistants that do real work, not chat widgets
- No retainers, no lock-in, no dependency after handoff
- 90 days post-launch support included
